name: Best Buy® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer; financing-focused store card

earning_rates.notes: Most purchases at Best Buy qualify for promotional financing rather than cash back

other_benefits.name: Promotional Financing
other_benefits.description: 0% APR financing on Best Buy purchases for 6-24 months (subject to credit approval)

other_benefits.name: My Best Buy Program
other_benefits.description: Ties to My Best Buy rewards program

notes: Primarily a store financing card, not a rewards card. Issued by Citi. Limited rewards value outside promotional offers. Less commonly featured in major credit card comparison sites.
